name: marketing-engine-video
description: Remotion explainer video covering every Marketing Engine skill

scripts.build: remotion render src/index.ts marketing-engine-skills out/marketing-engine-skills.mp4 && ./web-encode.sh out/marketing-engine-skills.mp4
scripts.build:en: remotion render src/index.ts marketing-engine-skills-en out/marketing-engine-skills-en.mp4 && ./web-encode.sh out/marketing-engine-skills-en.mp4
